{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Abidan network
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Abidan network]] is a private network used for entertainment and education.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
